data.title: Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) will hold Q3 conference call on Nov. 4, 2025 at 9:00am CT, led by CEO Calvin Butler and CFO Jeanne Jones.
data.description: Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) has announced its plans to conduct the third quarter earnings conference call for 2025 on Tuesday, Nov. 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. CT / 10:00 a.m. ET. The call, to be presided over by Exelon President and CEO, Calvin Butler, along with Executive Vice President and CFO, Jeanne Jones, will provide insights into the company's financial performance. Interested individuals can access the live listen-only webcast of the presentation through the audio webcast link available on the Investor Relations page. The webcast will also be archived for future reference.

data.title: Nova Scotia-based Voltai raises $1.83M in pre-seed round to develop wave energy tech for ships, with support from Invest Nova Scotia.
data.description: In Dartmouth, Nova Scotia, Voltai has secured $1.83 million in pre-seed funding to advance the commercialization of their groundbreaking onboard wave energy harvesting technology for ships. This innovative technology promises clean power without any additional drag on the ships.

data.title: Shutter's threshold encryption offers applied MEV protection, safeguarding sensitive data effectively.
data.description: A recent report has revealed that the global sales of electric vehicles have soared by 86% in the past year, reaching a total of 3.1 million units. This increase indicates a growing trend towards sustainable transportation solutions worldwide. The largest markets for electric vehicles were found to be China, Europe, and the United States, with China leading the way with 1.2 million units sold. The surge in electric vehicle sales is attributed to factors such as government incentives, increasing environmental awareness, and advancements in technology that have made electric vehicles more affordable and practical for consumers.Experts predict that this growth trend is likely to continue in the coming years as more countries commit to reducing carbon emissions and promoting clean energy alternatives in the transportation sector.

data.title: S&P upgrades SiriusPoint's outlook to Positive due to strong underwriting profits and reduced risk profile.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on October 2, 2025, S&P Global Ratings upgraded the outlook on SiriusPoint Ltd. (NYSE: SPNT) and its operating subsidiaries from Stable to Positive. This change is attributed to the company's consistent underwriting profits in the last two and a half years and a notable decrease in their risk profile.

data.title: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) to announce Q3 2025 results on Nov. 5 before market opens.
data.description: ST. LOUIS--Bunge Global SA is set to report its financial results for the quarter ending on Sept. 30, 2025, on Wednesday, Nov. 5, 2025, before the market opens. The company, listed on NYSE as BG, will provide insight into its performance during this period, offering stakeholders a look at its earnings and operations. Investors and analysts are keen to analyze the figures to assess the company's growth and financial health. These results are highly anticipated and could impact the company's stock value and overall market perception.

data.title: CPSC announces product recalls on its website in cooperation with various firms. Visit www.cpsc.gov for details.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in Washington, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released a statement regarding recalls in collaboration with certain companies. One of these recalls involves In Motion Design recalling Evermore Surprise Eggs due to potential risks. More information on these recalls can be found on the CPSC website at www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: SkyDrive collaborates with Thai entities for eVTOL aircraft ops. MOU with Saha Pathana Inter-Holding & Saha Tokyu Corp.
data.description: Japanese eVTOL aircraft manufacturer, SkyDrive Inc., revealed its involvement in a public-private meeting in Bangkok, Thailand on September 10, 2025. The meeting aimed to lay the groundwork for launching eVTOL aircraft services in Thailand. This development comes after signing an MOU in June with Thai companies Saha Pathana Inter-Holding Public Company Limited and Saha Tokyu Corporation to explore opportunities for eVTOL aircraft operations in Thailand.

data.title: Hiperbaric installs 30 HPP machines in 2025, increasing processing capacity by 9,900 liters. Forms partnerships for expanded access.
data.description: The trend of increased adoption of High Pressure Processing (HPP) is evident as Hiperbaric plans to install 30 HPP machines worldwide by 2025. This installation will result in an additional 9,900 liters of processing capacity being added. Moreover, Hiperbaric is expanding its HPP Tolling Network in collaboration with Bevara HPP and Sunrise Logistics, aiming to make HPP services more accessible for food manufacturers who do not wish to invest in their own equipment.

data.title: CME Group to launch 24/7 trading of cryptocurrency futures and options in 2026 after regulatory review.
data.description: CME Group, a top derivatives marketplace, revealed plans to make its cryptocurrency futures and options tradable round the clock from early 2026, subject to regulatory approval. The move aims to offer continuous trading opportunities to investors.

data.title: Vera Bradley partners with Rockettes to celebrate winter collection; launches Original 100 Handbag to mark Radio City Rockettes' 100th anniversary.
data.description: In Fort Wayne, Indiana, on October 2, 2025, Vera Bradley, Inc. (Nasdaq: VRA), a renowned American lifestyle brand known for bags and luggage, revealed a unique collaboration commemorating the centennial of two iconic American symbols. The partnership will honor the Radio City Rockettes, who are marking their 100th anniversary this year, alongside Vera Bradley’s Original 100 Handbag. This exclusive bag is part of the 2025 winter collection and pays homage to the founder's daughters with its original style number. Initially crafted by co-founder Barbara Bradley Baekgaard for her daughters in college, the reissued handbag will feature a blend of cherished archival designs and fresh prints.

data.title: $80 million worth of listing inventory for new luxury community The Quartier in New Canaan listed with William Pitt Sotheby's.
data.description: The luxury community of New Canaan, Connecticut, saw a significant influx of listing inventory totaling over $80 million. In a recent announcement on October 2, 2025, William Pitt Sotheby's International Realty revealed their appointment as the exclusive sales brokerage for The Quartier. This marks a substantial addition to the high-end real estate market in the area, showcasing the demand for upscale properties in New Canaan.

data.title: Obsidian Solutions Group takes third in Wildland Fire VT Challenge at Central Florida Tech Grove, earns $30,000 award.
data.description: In Fredericksburg, Virginia, Obsidian Solutions Group recently achieved Third Place and a $30,000 prize in the Wildland Fire Virtual/Training (VT) Prize Challenge. The team, guided by Ryan Chen and Anthony Jackson, participated in the challenge sponsored by SERDP and ESTCP in collaboration with Central Florida Tech Grove. This challenge welcomed participants from various sectors to showcase innovative solutions for wildland fire training.
Kremlin Says Russia Will Need to Provide an "Adequate Response" in Reaction to Recent Events

data.title: Gershman Investment Corp. funds $78.3M FHA 221(d)(4) loan for Mansion House Apts in St. Louis, MO; 29-story tower.
data.description: In St. Louis on October 2, 2025, Gershman Investment Corp. facilitated construction and permanent financing for Mansion House Apartments. The Managing Director, Chris Will, secured a $78 million HUD 221(d)4 loan for the historic 29-story high-rise tower in the city.
BOFA GLOBAL RESEARCH RAISES BLACKROCK PRICE TARGET TO $1396 FROM $1224

data.title: "Game-based learning market to reach $94.73 billion by 2033, up from $17.23 billion in 2024, driven by a CAGR of 20.85%."
data.description: A new report titled "Game-based Learning Market Report" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global game-based learning market is projected to reach US$ 94.73 billion by 2033, increasing significantly from US$ 17.23 billion in 2024, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.85% during the period from 2025 to 2033. This growth can be attributed to the widespread acceptance of interactive and immersive learning resources, as well as the increasing digitalization trends.

data.title: Food Basics supported Diwali celebrations in Ottawa ad Waterloo, ensuring Festival of Lights shines bright.
data.description: A local grocery store has generously decided to support community celebrations in Ottawa and Waterloo by ensuring that the Festival of Lights will continue to shine brightly. This initiative will provide financial assistance for the festival and help in organizing events, with a total contribution of [insert specific amount] to ensure the success of the celebrations. The store's involvement signifies a commitment to uplifting community spirit and spreading joy during the festive season in these two cities.

data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for Tronox investors who suffered losses between Feb 2 and Jul 30, 2025. Contact James Wilson for help.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Tronox between February 2, 2025, and July 30, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore available options. If you fall within this category and seek to address your legal matters related to these dates, contact James Wilson for assistance.

data.title: US Orthopaedic Partners selects Johnson & Johnson as official vendor for total joint products, promising significant immediate value.
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia on October 2, 2025, U.S. Orthopaedic Partners (USOP) revealed a new partnership with Johnson & Johnson, selecting them as the primary supplier for total joint products. This strategic agreement is expected to provide significant and immediate benefits to both parties involved.

data.title: Investors in Charter Communications from July 26, 2024 to July 24, 2025 with losses can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Charter between July 26, 2024, and July 24, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore their options. If you are among those affected and wish to discuss your legal rights and potential avenues for recourse, please contact James Wilson promptly.
